data.body: RESOLVED: optionality CI-red on main fixed and verified green. Two Gerrit changes landed: 529 (lazy httpx/pydantic_ai in llm/failure.py + _HEAVY AST-guard fix) and 530 (CLI review-code exit-0-on-disabled + optionality test raise-vs-structured-degrade split, fixing 2 pre-existing failures unmasked by 529). optionality run 29161429532 on merged commit 2cc3870d4: all jobs green. Key lesson: gerrit-verify (Verified vote) does NOT run the clean-wheel optionality job, and those degradation tests SKIP when the agents extra is present — so verify in a true no-extras clean venv AND confirm the actual optionality run, not just Verified+1. Ticket 0582-74a2-1811-43f0 closed (completion-verifier PASS).
